title: taraxacum extensum
intro: Taraxacum extensum, also known as the tall dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum extensum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce liver damage, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Taraxacum extensum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
